name: @aily-project/lib-sparkfun-can-bus
author: SparkFun Electronics, Sukking Pang
description: SparkFun CAN-Bus Shield Blockly 库，支持 MCP2515 初始化、收发帧、读取缓存数据和常用 OBD-II PID 请求。
description_zh_cn: SparkFun CAN-Bus Shield Blockly 库，支持 MCP2515 初始化、收发帧、读取缓存数据和常用 OBD-II PID 请求。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for the SparkFun CAN-Bus Shield and MCP2515 controller.
